name: PENDING
description: Order created on Wave, awaiting ERP acceptance.

name: ACCEPTED
description: ERP has submitted the Sales Order; push ACCEPTED to Wave.

name: REJECTED
description: ERP refused the order (out of stock, invalid customer, etc.).

name: UNDER_PICKING
description: Pick list created in ERP; Wave shows batch ids per item.

name: UNDER_DELIVERY
description: Delivery Note submitted; order is in transit.

name: PAYMENT_PENDING
description: Sales Invoice raised; awaiting full payment reconciliation.

name: CANCELLED
description: Order cancelled on Wave (inbound) or cancelled in ERP and pushed back.
